description: A United States Employment Authorization Document issued to non-citizens authorizing them to work in the United States.

card_number.instruction: The unique card number printed on the Employment Authorization Document. It may be labeled as Card Number or USCIS Number.

uscis_number.instruction: The USCIS number printed on the card. It may appear as USCIS# or USCIS Number.

category.instruction: The employment authorization category printed on the card such as C03B, A12, C09, or other eligibility category.

cardholder_name.instruction: The full name of the individual listed on the Employment Authorization Document.

date_of_birth.instruction: The date of birth of the cardholder.

country_of_birth.instruction: The country where the cardholder was born.

valid_from.instruction: The start date of the employment authorization validity period printed on the card.

card_expires.instruction: The expiration date printed on the Employment Authorization Document.

sex.instruction: The sex or gender listed on the card.
